title: elaphoglossum caulolepia
intro: Elaphoglossum caulolepia is a species of epiphytic fern in the family Dryopteridaceae, native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Elaphoglossum caulolepia include relief from fever, pain, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to act as an antiseptic and antifungal agent. Elaphoglossum caulolepia is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion for medicinal use, and it is often used in folk medicine to treat various ailments in the region where it is found.
